description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image with a before_script that runs apt-get clean, update and installs locales, wget, zip, unzip, lib32stdc++6 and lib32z1, downloads the Android SDK tools zip, extracts it to $ANDROID_HOME, creates license files and accepts SDK components via sdkmanager, downloads the Android NDK zip, extracts it, sets ANDROID_SDK_HOME and updates PATH, and makes ./gradlew executable. Define variables for ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK, ANDROID_HOME, ANDROID_NDK_HOME, ANDROID_NDK_VERSION, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS, GRADLE_OPTS, LANG, TERM and _JAVA_OPTIONS. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs ./gradlew assemble and publishes the app/build/outputs/ directory as artifacts. In the test stage add a unitTests job that runs ./gradlew test, with no additional rules, running on all branches.
